mapper.update: UPDATE saf.tn_saf_prdc_sply SET prdc_co_info = #{prdcCoInfo}, prdc_pos_batch_id = #{prdcPosBatchId}, prdc_pos_isue_dt = #{prdcPosIsueDt}, orgn_saf_qty = #{orgnSafQty}, saf_prdc_dt = #{safPrdcDt}, acqstn_dt = #{acqstnDt}, prdc_lc_addr = #{prdcLcAddr}, sply_co_info = #{splyCoInfo}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE batch_id = #{batchId}
